title: Ghost Drink (reverse pour + mask)

inputs.name: clip_1
inputs.what_to_film: This is the ghost drink effect and here's how to do it in

edit_steps.note: Get a shot of an empty glass and then a drink being poured in.
Reverse shot two so that it's moving backwards.
Turn this into an overlay and drop it underneath.
Add a horizontal mask and then flip this.
Take the line of the mask up to the top of the full drink.
Set a keyframe then move forward slightly and track the drink as it moves down.
This will automatically set more keyframes and that's it you're all done.

narration_transcript: This is the ghost drink effect and here's how to do it in cap cut. Get a shot of an empty glass and then a drink being poured in. Now reverse shot two so that it's moving backwards. Then turn this into an overlay and drop it underneath. Add a horizontal mask and then flip this. Take the line of the mask up to the top of the full drink. Set a keyframe then move forward slightly and track the drink as it moves down. This will automatically set more keyframes and that's it you're all done.

source_meta.caption:
Ghost drink effect… So easy - all you need is your phone!

Save this video so you can try it later.
